hero.eyebrow: pierrondi.dev / software, automation, agents and applied AI
hero.body: I design the narrative, build the interface, wire up automations, agents and AI flows, and bring real proof straight from Git. Instead of a pretty, vague homepage, pierrondi.dev turns into a page that qualifies leads, reinforces technical depth and starts sales conversations with more context.
hero.proofTitle: Real proof pulled from the repository.
hero.proofImageAlt: Technical environment lit with blue and orange tones

problem.body: The point is not to look big. It is to look trustworthy, specific and shippable. When the visitor understands what you deliver, sees real artifacts and finds a tight offer, the conversation shifts from price to value.

pains.title: No proof, lead negotiates price.
pains.text: If the page does not show real execution, the visitor compares you to any agency that talks pretty.

pains.title: No structure, the chat dies on WhatsApp.
pains.text: A vague offer and generic CTA produce low intent. You get cold pings instead of leads ready to move.

pains.title: No visible track record, your authority is invisible.
pains.text: You have built plenty in Git, but it has not turned into a commercial narrative inside the site.

about.body: pierrondi.dev is a technical founder operation with deep background in software, product and automation. The goal is not to look like a big agency. It is to quickly solve what helps your business sell, run better or ship something new without bureaucracy in the middle.

principles.title: You talk directly to the person who decides and implements.
principles.desc: No account-management layer, no noise between briefing and code. Diagnosis and execution travel together.

principles.title: AI enters to speed up delivery, not to pad proposals.
principles.desc: Claude, Gemini, n8n and Make come in as operational leverage when they improve timeline, quality or scope.

principles.title: Closed scope so the project does not turn into a soap opera.
principles.desc: The rule is simple: pick the piece that unblocks sales now and execute it well before expanding.

principles.title: Code, access and structure stay with you.
principles.desc: No black box. The asset must remain useful after delivery, whether it is a site, automation or product.

metrics.note: Instead of inventing cases, the home page shows what already exists in the repo. That builds authority without sounding manufactured.

items.label: routes and pages structured in the app

portfolio.body: Instead of inventing client cases, the home page uses real snippets from the repo as proof of execution: tools, content, technical structure and depth in automation and applied AI. Honest portfolio and commercial pitch at the same time.

items.title: Automation ROI calculator
items.label: Interactive tool
items.description: A piece that escapes the generic and pulls the lead into a conversation grounded in numbers. It computes monthly savings, payback and ROI to sell automation and AI with real context.

items.title: Technical blog to attract the right lead
items.label: Commercial content
items.description: Four articles with clear intent: n8n, MVP, fractional CTO and AI for SMBs. Not a vanity blog — it is depth, SEO and authority on topics that sell tech and AI services.

items.title: Institutional funnel ready for trust
items.label: Conversion base
items.description: Pricing, FAQ, terms, privacy, schema and health check pages. The message is simple: not just design — a commercial foundation ready to sell software, automation and AI with more confidence.

services.body: You do not need to hire a whole team to fix the next bottleneck. You need to pick the right piece: automation, MVP, App Store Connect or ongoing technical direction — with AI as practical leverage, not buzzword.

items.title: Express Automation
items.description: Manual workflow that today blocks operations, support or back office. I map, implement and ship it with less friction — including AI, agents and auto-classification when they reduce cost or time.
items: AI and agents where it makes sense

items.title: Digital Product (MVP)
items.description: Web app, micro-SaaS or internal tool with a tight scope. Goal: ship something functional fast, with a base to keep going and room for copilots, content analysis and AI flows when it fits.

items.title: Tech Partner
items.description: When you need ongoing technical direction to decide stack, vendors, architecture, roadmap and AI strategy with less risk and more execution criteria.

items.title: App Store Connect
items.description: For an iOS app that is already built and needs a clean App Store Connect setup: metadata, screenshots, privacy details and basic ASO for organic search.

steps.label: Diagnostic
steps.title: Quick read of the context
steps.description: I look at offer, site, operational bottleneck and what already exists in your Git to understand where automation, agents or AI actually help you sell or run better right now.

steps.label: Scope
steps.title: Pick what ships first
steps.description: We define one piece with a beginning, middle and end: landing, automation, MVP, internal agent or technical direction. No inflated scope, no generic promises.

steps.label: Build
steps.title: Execution in short cycles
steps.description: Interface, copy, automation, prompts, integrations and technical structure move together. The goal is to ship something strong quickly — not become an eternal project.

steps.label: Go-live
steps.title: Launch and final tuning
steps.description: I deploy, test, validate the critical flow and leave the base ready for sales, inbound or daily operations, with AI already wired into the process.

contact.body: Send me the context — business, bottleneck or idea. I respond with product vision, technical feasibility, automation or AI opportunity and the best next step so we don’t waste time.
points: Honest diagnostic of site, operation and AI within 24 business hours
Closed scope before any build starts
You talk to the person who designs, integrates and ships to production

fields.messagePlaceholder: What do you sell today, which bottleneck do you want to solve or what kind of product do you want to ship?

footer.desc: Software, automation, agents and pages that help your business sell with more clarity.

whatsappMessage: Hi! I’d like a free diagnostic for my project.
